decisionMemorySummary.note: Aggregates Codex recommendation snapshots compared against final human workbench decisions. Missing historical Codex recommendations remain unavailable and are not inferred.

meta.note: Codex-first conservative review. Human QC still required before merge.

highRiskItems.reviewerReasoningSummary: Yellow triangular sign shows car over water (submersible/flooded). OCR/extracted correct = A 'tronson submersible' but top machine candidate q0733 = 'slippery section' (mismatch). Other candidates (e.g. 'flooded road') exist but option-letter mappings differ. Ambiguous candidate alignment — leave unresolved for human review.

Source states 'more than 12 points during probation => license withdrawn (retiré)'. Candidates refer to reaching 12 points, detention, or other administrative actions — wording and consequence ("more than 12" vs "reach 12" and "withdrawn" vs "detained/revoked") differ. Cannot safely map.

Statement 'flee after causing accident => license revoked for life' is stronger than nearest candidates (which mention criminal status, bans, or other sanctions). No clear exact-match qid; do not approve.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reviewerReasoningSummary: Yellow triangular sign shows car over water (submersible/flooded). OCR/extracted correct = A 'tronson submersible' but top machine candidate q0733 = 'slippery section' (mismatch). Other candidates (e.g. 'flooded road') exist but option-letter mappings differ. Ambiguous candidate alignment — leave unresolved for human review.

Image shows a yellow triangle with arrow indicating bypass/avoid on the left. q0866 in bank corresponds to 'bypass from left side'. Source option A = 'dévier par la gauche'. Some candidate matches favored right-side variants (conflict), so moderate confidence.
rejectedTopMatcherExamples.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top automatic candidate (q0785) suggested bypass/right; visual arrow indicates left bypass so selected q0866 instead.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reviewerReasoningSummary: Rectangular red/white sign with arrows likely indicates keep/right or drive on right side. q0753 corresponds to 'driving by the right side of the road'. Extracted correct key was B. Candidate matches are weak/discordant so lower confidence.
rejectedTopMatcherExamples.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top automatic candidate (q0715) differed; chosen q0753 because the sign semantics (drive by right) best match the source option B.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reviewerReasoningSummary: Image shows a rural POV with no clear lane markings; prompt asks how motor vehicles circulate. Candidate matches are unrelated and image semantics are ambiguous (stay in lane vs. keep to side). Cannot confidently map to existing qid or source option.

Image shows a car stopped at/near a crosswalk; q0460's correct answer is 'stopping in the crosswalk' which maps to French option B. Some candidate confusion with 'no-stopping marking' so confidence moderate.
Question about penalty points for running a red light matches q0394 (correct = 6 points). French option C = 6.

Source states 'more than 12 points during probation => license withdrawn (retiré)'. Candidates refer to reaching 12 points, detention, or other administrative actions — wording and consequence ("more than 12" vs "reach 12" and "withdrawn" vs "detained/revoked") differ. Cannot safely map.

Statement 'flee after causing accident => license revoked for life' is stronger than nearest candidates (which mention criminal status, bans, or other sanctions). No clear exact-match qid; do not approve.
Prompt about observing rear traffic in both mirrors before merging aligns with q0055 (correct = True). French 'Yes' is option A.
Source states 'turn on indicator and drive quickly into lane' which is a prohibited practice; q0013 corresponds and is marked Wrong. French 'No' = B.

Source asks when overtaking the preceding vehicle is forbidden; correct legal rule is 'when the preceding vehicle is overtaking' (French option D). No clear exact-match candidate in shortlist, so recommend creating new localized q.
q0162 meaning ('reduce speed, keep right to yield') matches French A ('ralentir vers la droite pour le laisser passer'); approve despite candidate ranking differences.
rejectedTopMatcherExamples.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top-ranked candidate (q0981) is unrelated; accepted q0162 (rank 2) because of semantic match.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reviewerReasoningSummary: Source asks about overtaking on mountain road (choose a gentle descent). Top candidate q0172's correct option refers to a wide gentle uphill section — option sets differ; create new item to preserve localized wording.
At a dangerous curve the safest localized answer is to 'slow down completely and keep to the right' (D). No single existing qid cleanly matches this phrasing/options.
q0309 states that a vehicle that cannot run normally after an accident should be towed by rescue/tow truck — matches source; localized 'Yes' = A.
rejectedTopMatcherExamples.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top-ranked candidates (q0104/q0097) are about lane changes; selected q0309 (rank 3) for direct semantic match.

rejectedTopMatcherExamples.reviewerReasoningSummary: Advice to avoid driving with high-heeled shoes is a valid safety item but no clear existing qid match in candidates; create new.
Overtaking bicycles: correct localized action is to observe and slow to leave sufficient space (B). Candidate set lacks a clear exact match; create new to preserve wording.
q0206 states owner must apply for reissuing/changing registration when a license plate is destroyed — matches source; localized 'Yes' = A.
rejectedTopMatcherExamples.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top candidate (q0205) is related but not about reissuing plate; selected q0206 (rank 2) for direct match.

items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Machine top match q0383 asks same question (drivers >60 medical exam). Master correct = 'every 1 year'; in the French options 'tous les ans' is source letter C — mapped accordingly.
Statement matches q0315 (illegal occupation of emergency lane → 6-point penalty). Source Yes/No options: correct = Yes (A).

Machine candidate q0150's correct text = 'the fog light'. Source options include 'feu antibrouillard' (D) which matches. Some candidate-language hints conflict about low beams vs fog — moderate uncertainty.
Dashboard image is yellow ABS indicator; q0586 correct = 'ABS system malfunction' which matches source option A.
Source statement ('must travel on right-side shoulder') aligns semantically with q0103 which is False/Wrong. Source Yes/No mapping: correct = No (B). Matching score modest.
q0029 prompt matches caution about stopping immediately on highway when tired; master indicates Wrong (do not stop immediately on highway) → source 'No' (B). Candidate similarity moderate.
Blue sign with three arrows (two straight + one merging) — machine q0823 correct = 'the number of lanes increases' which matches source option C 'ajout de voies de circulation'. Match score moderate.
Question about which conduct yields 12 penalty points; machine q0370 correct = 'use falsified license plate' which matches source option B.
Image is windsock warning sign; q0835 correct = 'mind crosswinds' which corresponds to source option A 'attention vent latéral'.

Yellow triangular sign shows car over water (submersible/flooded). OCR/extracted correct = A 'tronson submersible' but top machine candidate q0733 = 'slippery section' (mismatch). Other candidates (e.g. 'flooded road') exist but option-letter mappings differ. Ambiguous candidate alignment — leave unresolved for human review.

Statement says use emergency braking in rain. q0052 addresses the (false) recommendation to use emergency braking on wet roads; meaning matches. Machine top match supports Wrong -> choose French 'No' (B).
Image and prompt ask meaning of continuous yellow curb line; q0709 maps to 'no parking'. Source option D = 'interdit de stationner' matches.
Sign is a right-arrow inside prohibition circle = 'no right turn'. q0715 correctOption = no right turn; source option B matches.

Image shows a yellow triangle with arrow indicating bypass/avoid on the left. q0866 in bank corresponds to 'bypass from left side'. Source option A = 'dévier par la gauche'. Some candidate matches favored right-side variants (conflict), so moderate confidence.
items.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top automatic candidate (q0785) suggested bypass/right; visual arrow indicates left bypass so selected q0866 instead.

items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Statement 'Cannot make a U-turn in this section' matches q0319. Machine top candidate strongly supports 'Right' (true). French option A = 'Yes' corresponds to Right/True.
Image is a yellow warning sign with a rightward arrow = sharp right curve. q0730 maps to 'sharp right curve'. Source option B = 'virage dangereux à droite' matches.

Road has yellow broken+solid center line. q0725 meaning: side with solid line may not cross. Source options contain duplicated/ambiguous OCR text; option A (first occurrence) reads 'interdiction de franchir la ligne à coté de la ligne continue' which matches 'cannot cross from side of solid line'.

Rectangular red/white sign with arrows likely indicates keep/right or drive on right side. q0753 corresponds to 'driving by the right side of the road'. Extracted correct key was B. Candidate matches are weak/discordant so lower confidence.
items.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top automatic candidate (q0715) differed; chosen q0753 because the sign semantics (drive by right) best match the source option B.

items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Question asks which auxiliary method to control speed on a descent; correct is engine braking. q0124 corresponds to 'use the engine to brake'. Source option B matches.
Image shows a hand-grip on steering wheel that is depicted as incorrect in q0561. Machine candidate marks this as Wrong; source options A Yes / B No => correct = No (B).

Green rectangular highway sign showing an emergency stopping area; machine top match q0740 ('highway emergency strip') and source option A ('zone autoroutière d'arrêt d'urgence') are semantically equivalent.

Image shows a rural POV with no clear lane markings; prompt asks how motor vehicles circulate. Candidate matches are unrelated and image semantics are ambiguous (stay in lane vs. keep to side). Cannot confidently map to existing qid or source option.

Dashboard icon depicts airflow to face and feet; master q0613 correct text = 'floor and the front fans work'. Source option B ('être soufflé en face et du plancher') matches that meaning — map master to source option B.
Blue circular sign with white '50' = mandatory minimum speed. Machine top candidate q0891 denotes minimum speed 50 km/h; source option B explicitly 'vitesse minimale à 50km/h' matches master meaning.

Image shows a central control lever in center console; top candidate q0578 identifies 'gear lever'. Source option C = 'le levier de vitesse' matches. Some visual ambiguity with parking brake in candidates, so moderate confidence.
Statement 'forbidden to park less than 50 m from bridge/steep slope/tunnel' matches q0258 prompt; q0258 correct = Right. Source option A = 'Yes' corresponds to Right.
Text-only safe-driving scenario: presence of non-motorized vehicles and water -> slow down. Machine top match q0107 ('reduce speed and go slowly') and source option A ('ralentir') align.
Triangular warning sign with falling rocks depicted; q0811 correct = 'watch out for falling rocks'. Source option C ('risque de chute de pierres') is direct match.
Prohibitory sign showing a left-turn arrow with red slash = 'no left turn'. Machine q0695 correct = 'no turning left'. Source option A ('défense de tourner à gauche') matches master meaning.

Green rectangular sign showing '1620 kHz' and Chinese text — indicates highway traffic radio frequency. Master q0847 correct = 'traffic radio frequency'; source option B ('information sur les chaînes radio du trafic autoroutier') matches that meaning. Some candidate ordering differences present, hence medium risk.
Source asks max speed on muddy road; candidate q0396 prompt and options match (correct = 30 km/h). French option C = 30 km/h.
Prompt about postponing license renewal for military/abroad matches q0448 (3 years). French option C = 3 ans.

Image shows a car stopped at/near a crosswalk; q0460's correct answer is 'stopping in the crosswalk' which maps to French option B. Some candidate confusion with 'no-stopping marking' so confidence moderate.
ROW item matches q0263 which states police may fine 200 yuan when party remains and causes congestion; French 'Yes' is option A.
Question about penalty points for running a red light matches q0394 (correct = 6 points). French option C = 6.

Source states 'more than 12 points during probation => license withdrawn (retiré)'. Candidates refer to reaching 12 points, detention, or other administrative actions — wording and consequence ("more than 12" vs "reach 12" and "withdrawn" vs "detained/revoked") differ. Cannot safely map.

Statement 'flee after causing accident => license revoked for life' is stronger than nearest candidates (which mention criminal status, bans, or other sanctions). No clear exact-match qid; do not approve.
Prompt about observing rear traffic in both mirrors before merging aligns with q0055 (correct = True). French 'Yes' is option A.
Source states 'turn on indicator and drive quickly into lane' which is a prohibited practice; q0013 corresponds and is marked Wrong. French 'No' = B.

Source asks when overtaking the preceding vehicle is forbidden; correct legal rule is 'when the preceding vehicle is overtaking' (French option D). No clear exact-match candidate in shortlist, so recommend creating new localized q.
Source asks what a directional sign indicates; q0699 prompt/options match meaning (direction) and source option C = 'direction'.
q0162 meaning ('reduce speed, keep right to yield') matches French A ('ralentir vers la droite pour le laisser passer'); approve despite candidate ranking differences.
items.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top-ranked candidate (q0981) is unrelated; accepted q0162 (rank 2) because of semantic match.

items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Source asks about overtaking on mountain road (choose a gentle descent). Top candidate q0172's correct option refers to a wide gentle uphill section — option sets differ; create new item to preserve localized wording.
Statement that license plates must comply with regulations matches q0190 (ROW true). Local 'Yes' is option A.
At a dangerous curve the safest localized answer is to 'slow down completely and keep to the right' (D). No single existing qid cleanly matches this phrasing/options.
q0309 states that a vehicle that cannot run normally after an accident should be towed by rescue/tow truck — matches source; localized 'Yes' = A.
items.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top-ranked candidates (q0104/q0097) are about lane changes; selected q0309 (rank 3) for direct semantic match.

items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Advice to avoid driving with high-heeled shoes is a valid safety item but no clear existing qid match in candidates; create new.
q0433 lists acts subject to 12-point penalty; its 'deliberately staining the plate' option maps to source option A. Approve with locale answer A.
Overtaking bicycles: correct localized action is to observe and slow to leave sufficient space (B). Candidate set lacks a clear exact match; create new to preserve wording.
q0206 states owner must apply for reissuing/changing registration when a license plate is destroyed — matches source; localized 'Yes' = A.
items.rejectedTopMatcherReason: Top candidate (q0205) is related but not about reissuing plate; selected q0206 (rank 2) for direct match.
